calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Trainable policy head on the REE latent (Track-1d): does a real PPO actor on frozen z_world recover competence (direct H1 test of prediction-rich/action-poor)
items.note: Track-1d of the post-724 competence-recovery campaign (conversion_ceiling_campaign:CAMPAIGN). DIAGNOSTIC (experiment_purpose=diagnostic, claim_ids=[], non_contributory; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING; brake-EXEMPT). THE DIRECT H1 test the 724 autopsy prescribed but neither 734 nor 735 runs: bolt a real trainable PPO actor-critic onto REE's OWN frozen z_world latent (agent.sense(obs).z_world.detach()) and ask whether it forages where the bias-head stack cannot. 734's PPO reads RAW obs (never uses REE's representation); this reads the REE latent. Arms per (rung,seed): ree_bias_head (warmed 724-A0 all-ON under its own bias-head selection = incompetence control), ppo_ree_latent (H1 treatment: PPO on frozen z_world), ppo_raw_obs (734's raw-obs PPO = encoder-loss reference), greedy_oracle (ceiling/readiness), random_walk (floor). Two rungs imported byte-identical from 734: D0 (724 baseline, deficit localized) + D3 (hazard-free, fair usability test). Reuses 734's validated PPO machinery (PPOPolicyNet/_ppo_update/_compute_gae) + 724-A0 warmup (_train_all_on_agent) verbatim; only adds the z_world state-extractor + a state_fn-parameterized PPO trainer. Self-route (HYPOTHESIS): readiness fail (either oracle sub-floor OR bias_head already clears D0 so premise not reproduced) -> substrate_not_ready_requeue; ppo_ree_latent clears 1.0 majority at hazard-free D3 -> policy_head_on_latent_recovers_competence (H1 CONFIRMED: REE latent is a usable action-learning substrate, the bias-head was the deficit -> build a policy-learning substrate on the existing representation); latent sub-floor but ppo_raw_obs clears -> latent_lossy_raw_obs_recovers (encoder discards signal -> route obs-encoding P-C/739); neither clears at oracle-achievable D3 -> policy_learning_insufficient_or_deeper (weigh against 738 local_view_greedy which DID forage the same env). CONVERTS the campaign's central build decision from inference to MEASUREMENT. priority 155 (higher=runs-first, above 734's 150). Mint N/A (ARM_FINGERPRINT_EXEMPT: per-cell REE warmup + PPO from scratch, no reusable baseline). validate_experiments --strict OK; dry-run smoke PASS end-to-end (all 5 arms x 2 rungs execute, z_world extraction + latent PPO train/eval + self-route wiring correct; dry policy_learning_insufficient label expected at 6 PPO eps). Portfolio 737/738/739 (P-A this / P-B anchor landed / P-C encoder reserve). Route result to /failure-autopsy before governance use.

items.title: MECH-456 functional-rebinding redesign, Leg P-A (training-regime axis): run the 733 functional test on a survival-onboarded agent so overtakes accrue
items.note: Leg P-A of the V3-EXQ-733a 2-leg GOV-FANOUT-1 portfolio (sibling: V3-EXQ-733a-b directed-traversal). supersedes V3-EXQ-733. EVIDENCE (claim-tagged functional test of MECH-456 entities.rebinding_under_perturbation; candidate/v3_pending). WHY 733 FAILED (not a rebinding verdict): a COLD agent dies in ~10-40 steps in the lethal SD-054 env (done=health<=0; episodes capped at 120<500), so within-episode ground-truth region overtakes were starved -- only seed 42 reached the 20-overtake floor. The binder itself is fine (DV1 6/6, DV2 5/6). P-A FIX = TRAINING-REGIME axis: before the functional test, ONBOARD the agent for survival with the validated scaffolded_sd054_onboarding curriculum (the exact 603m/603n recipe that reached P1 survival 3/3; Stage-0->Stage-0b->P0->Stage-H->P1). The curriculum never touches cross_stream_binder, so the binder is still trained fresh in the functional test's own P0 (as in 733) -- clean single-variable change vs 733. Reuses the 733 measurement harness (experiments/_lib/rebinding_functional_harness.py). DV1 tracks-truth-above-shuffle + DV2 graded non-saturating re-acq latency (ON vs FROZEN over one shared trajectory/seed). NULL (declared): even survival-onboarded, if min overtakes/seed < 20 on >=4/6 seeds -> self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue (non_contributory) => survival is NOT the (only) lever (P-B carries the discrimination). evidence_direction non_contributory on readiness-unmet; MECH-456 stays candidate/v3_pending regardless (V3-pending gate). No ree_core change. Re-derive brake NOT fired (1 substrate_ceiling/non_contributory autopsy on MECH-456 < threshold 2); portfolio is a sanctioned GOV-FANOUT-1 discrimination regardless. progress note: onboarding curriculum (235 eps/seed) is silent; episodes_per_run=65 counts only the functional-test ep N/65 prints, so the runner bar sits at 0% during onboarding then advances -- ETA under-counts onboarding. Smoke: py_compile OK; validate_experiments --strict OK; dry-run PASS end-to-end (onboarding 5 stages + functional test execute; onboarded=1/1; self-routes substrate_not_ready on tiny-P0 unconverged binder as designed; no dry manifest leak). Route result to /governance (writes MECH-456 evidence_quality_note); consumes failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-733_2026-07-10.

items.title: Drive/reward-balance approach-weighting sweep (Track-1b): is the 728 forage-vs-survive inversion a reward-balance failure (drive-gain-buildable) or not the lever
items.note: Track-1b post-724 competence-recovery. DIAGNOSTIC (experiment_purpose=diagnostic, claim_ids=[], non_contributory; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING). Tests whether the V3-EXQ-728 forage-vs-survive inversion (foraging normalized -0.016 / survival +6.07 on the trained all-ON stack) is a DRIVE/REWARD-BALANCE failure vs an architecture-face failure (724 held the balance FIXED, deficit diffuse). Staircase along ONE approach-vs-avoid axis in the E3 selection argmin: APPROACH gains benefit_weight/goal_weight UP + AVOID gains lambda_ethical/rho_residue DOWN (cfg.e3). A0=724/728 default balance (control, reproduces incompetence) + A1/A2/A3 progressively approach-weighted. Each drive arm trains the all-ON stack with the 724 A0 recipe (P0=200 warmup + P1=90 two-head REINFORCE, e2 frozen in P1) IMPORTED (not copied) from v3_exq_724, evaluated via reusable capability_eval REEForwardPolicy so A0 is directly comparable to 728. Load-bearing DV foraging_competence; secondary survival_horizon (expect forage UP/survival DOWN off +6.07 outlier). Anchors: capability_eval random-walk floor + greedy-oracle ceiling. Readiness=oracle clears 1.0 floor. Self-route (HYPOTHESIS): any approach arm majority supra-floor -> reward_balance_is_the_lever (route /implement-substrate drive-gain retuning); else reward_balance_not_the_lever; oracle below floor / A0 clears floor / <5 eval eps -> substrate_not_ready_requeue. BRAKE-EXEMPT (competence/reward-balance diagnostic, not a conversion/de-commit falsifier; claim_ids=[] zeroes re-derive brake). SIBLING of Track-1a V3-EXQ-734 (env-difficulty sweep). A0 default-balance all-ON cell emitted reuse-eligible (mint-as-you-go, include_driver_script_in_hash=False); approach arms re-train so fingerprints correctly refuse. Maps conversion_ceiling_campaign:CAMPAIGN. Route to /failure-autopsy before any governance action. Smoke: dry-run PASS (anchors discriminate oracle 3.5 vs random 0; readiness gate fired on dry P2<5); validate_experiments --strict OK; validate_queue OK.

items.title: Curriculum competence-recovery diagnostic (Track-1c): does a two-stage easy->hard curriculum clear the 1.0 foraging floor where flat P1-long (724 A1/A4) did not, or is transfer/capacity the true ceiling
items.note: Track-1c of the post-724 competence-recovery campaign (conversion_ceiling_campaign:CAMPAIGN). diagnostic; claim_ids=[]; non_contributory; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING. Two-stage CURRICULUM training: Stage-A train the all-ON stack (714 ARM_ON via 724 A0 recipe) to forage an EASY env, then Stage-B fine-tune into the hard 724 env. Arms at MATCHED 300ep total P1: A0 flat-hard control (==724 A1), C1 curriculum e2-frozen-in-StageB, C2 curriculum e2-unfrozen-in-StageB, C3 3-rung easy->med->hard. Load-bearing DV: HARD-env P2 mean_resources_per_episode vs 1.0 floor; Stage-A EASY foraging is the load-bearing PREMISE (same statistic/floor). Self-route (HYPOTHESIS): both oracles clear + a curriculum arm forages easy AND clears hard while A0 does not -> competence_curriculum_buildable (route /implement-substrate staged regime); premise met but no arm clears hard -> transfer_capacity_ceiling; premise/oracle/A0 fail -> substrate_not_ready_requeue. BRAKE-EXEMPT (competence/curriculum diagnostic, not a conversion/de-commit falsifier; claim_ids=[] zeroes the re-derive brake). OBS-DIM PARITY: easy/med rungs keep reef structural channels ON (world_obs_dim=275 == hard) but neutralize difficulty, so the transferred agent's fixed-width encoder spans all rungs (guarded at runtime). ID moved 734->736: 734/735 were taken by sibling Tracks 1a (env-difficulty sweep) / 1b (drive-balance) between design and queue; Track-1a had not produced results, so the easy config was chosen independently and is validated by the Stage-A readiness gate. Route result to /failure-autopsy before any governance action.
